'''Ashaad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] in the [[People's Liberation Battalion]] on [[Eiattu 6]]. He was shot and wounded when [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]] confronted [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|the impostor]] of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Harrandatha Estillo|Harran]].
